name: sql-pro
description: Optimizes SQL queries, designs database schemas, and troubleshoots performance issues. Use when a user asks why their query is slow, needs help writing complex joins or aggregations, mentions database performance issues, or wants to design or migrate a schema. Invoke for complex queries, window functions, CTEs, indexing strategies, query plan analysis, covering index creation, recursive queries, EXPLAIN/ANALYZE interpretation, before/after query benchmarking, or migrating queries between databas
author: jeffallan
summary_zh: 这是一款帮你搞定SQL优化与数据库设计的工具，专治查询太慢、复杂语句难写等性能瓶颈，在设计表结构或做数据库迁移时也非常好用。
